metadata.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

body.title: Considerations for traffic steering to SRv6
ESP Protection for Services over SRv6
2.1 IPv6&SRv6 Powering Alibaba Cloud AI Computing (Alibaba)
2.3. SRv6 for End-to-End Services (Guangdong Power Grid)
2.7.1 ESP Protection for Services over SRv6
